recommendations.title: Trigger Warning
recommendations.overview: A Special Forces commando uncovers a dangerous conspiracy when she returns to her hometown looking for answers into her beloved father's death.

recommendations.title: May the Devil Take You
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find answers to her estranged father's mysterious illness, a young woman visits his old villa and uncovers a horrifying truth from the past.

recommendations.title: The Judge
recommendations.overview: A successful lawyer returns to his hometown for his mother's funeral only to discover that his estranged father, the town's judge, is suspected of murder.

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: Island of Death
recommendations.overview: A British couple on a break on a small Greek Island spreads terror beyond anything the Islanders could ever have imagined, only stopping every once in a while to shag anything that moves, be it man, woman or animal. But will they go unpunished, or wi

recommendations.title: Succubus
recommendations.overview: A new father going through a marital separation joins a dating app and matches with a beautiful but mysterious young woman... whose powers of seduction and manipulation entangle him in a mystery more horrifying than he could have ever imagined.

recommendations.title: Dolan's Cadillac
recommendations.overview: Robinson, a once peaceful, law-abiding school teacher, has turned into an obsessed vengeance machine, intent on killing the man who murdered his wife - ruthless Las Vegas mob boss James Dolan. But to do so, Robinson must infiltrate the dangerous unde

recommendations.title: Una
recommendations.overview: When a young woman unexpectedly arrives at an older man's workplace, looking for answers, the secrets of the past threaten to unravel his new life.

recommendations.title: Barbie as the Island Princess
recommendations.overview: Young Rosella is saved by a few kind animals after a shipwreck. Now called Ro, she learns to talk to animals. One day, she saves the life of a prince and returns to civilisation to discover her past.

recommendations.title: Don't Worry, I'm Fine
recommendations.overview: A 19-year-old searches for her twin brother after he runs away from home, following a fight with their father.
